description.p: BiGame-mode dynamically tunes your system for gaming workloads. It integrates falcond, sched-ext schedulers, AMD VCache, PowerProfiles, GameMode, Gamescope, and MangoHud into a single Libadwaita interface.

ul.li: Game profile management with per-game scheduler and VCache settings
One-click Booster Mode via PowerProfiles D-Bus
Gamescope launch panel with FSR, resolution, and framerate controls
Falcond daemon configuration and status monitoring
Background daemon mode — stays alive in the tray

description.p: Initial release with dashboard, profiles, tuning, and gamescope panels.
